name: Minty Mallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine over hot water, sweetened condensed milk and mint chocolate chips. Stir until chips are melted and mixture is smooth.
2. In a large bowl, combine marshmallows and nuts.
3. Add chocolate mixture; mix well.
4. Spread into a foil-lined 9-inch square pan.
5. Chill until firm, about 20 minutes.
